subscriptions.title: Subscription
subscriptions.downgradePending: Downgrade will take effect at the end of billing cycle
subscriptions.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel your subscription?
subscriptions.noActiveSubscriptionDescription: You don't have an active subscription. Choose a plan to get started.
subscriptions.manageSubscription: Manage your subscription plan and billing
subscriptions.cancelConfirmWithDate: Are you sure you want to cancel your subscription? You'll continue to have access until the end of your current billing period on {{date}}.
subscriptions.cancelReasonLabel: Help us improve - Why are you cancelling? (Optional)
subscriptions.upgradeMessage: Your new plan will be activated immediately. You will be charged the prorated difference for the remaining period.
subscriptions.downgradeMessage: The plan downgrade will take effect at the end of your current billing period.
subscriptions.scheduledDowngradeWarning: You have a scheduled plan change
subscriptions.scheduledDowngradeInfo: You will be moved to {{plan}} plan on {{date}}.

plansPage.title: Choose Your Plan
plansPage.subtitle: Select the perfect plan for your restaurant business
plansPage.noPlans: No subscription plans available at the moment.
plansPage.redirectToPayment: You'll be redirected to payment after confirming
plansPage.toChangePlan: To change your plan, visit the subscription management page
plansPage.faqChangePlansAnswer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time from the subscription management page.
plansPage.faqPaymentMethods: What payment methods do you accept?
plansPage.faqPaymentMethodsAnswer: We accept all major credit and debit cards through PayTR, our secure Turkish payment provider.
plansPage.faqCancelAnytimeAnswer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. You'll continue to have access until the end of your billing period.
plansPage.faqFreeTrialAnswer: Yes, most paid plans include a 14-day free trial. You won't be charged until the trial period ends.

checkout.redirecting: Redirecting you to the secure payment page...
checkout.missingLink: Payment link could not be created. Please try again.
checkout.confirmBody: Payment is handled by PayTR's secure infrastructure. Your card details never reach our app.
checkout.consentRequired: You must accept the KVKK, Distance Sales and Refund policies.
checkout.consentLoadError: Something went wrong while loading the KVKK, Distance Sales and Refund policies. Please try again.
checkout.consentIntro: To continue your subscription you need to approve the three documents below. Once you tick all the boxes you can move to the payment step with the "Continue" button.
checkout.consentRefund: Refund Policy and 14-Day Right of Withdrawal
checkout.consentLegalFooter: Your approval is recorded together with your device information and IP address for KVKK auditing.
checkout.cardCurrencyUnsupported: Card payment is not available for this currency.
checkout.cardUnavailableNote: Card payment is unavailable because this plan is priced in {{currency}}. You can pay by bank transfer / EFT.
checkout.noPaymentMethodBody: No payment method is available for this plan right now. Please choose another plan or contact support.

bankTransfer.title: Bank transfer / EFT details
bankTransfer.intro: Make the payment to the account below. Don't forget to add the reference code in the description field.
bankTransfer.confirmationNote: Your access will be enabled once our bank transfer team confirms the payment. Confirmation is usually completed quickly.

paymentResult.confirmingHint: Waiting for PayTR confirmation. This may take a few seconds.
paymentResult.confirmingStage2: The transaction may take a few more seconds...
paymentResult.confirmingStage3: Still connecting. This can sometimes take up to 30 seconds.
paymentResult.successBody: Your subscription is active. You can start using it right away.
paymentResult.failBody: Your payment failed. Return to plans to try again.

statusBanner.gracePeriod: Your payment could not be taken — pay within {{days}} days or your account will be downgraded to the free plan

taxIdReminder.title: Complete your billing details
taxIdReminder.body: Your invoice will be more complete with a tax ID (Vergi No / TC Kimlik No). You can proceed without it; the invoice will simply omit that line.

limitWarning.full: {{resource}} limit reached ({{limit}}). Upgrade your plan to add more.

cancelModal.title: Cancel subscription
cancelModal.reasonPrompt: Why are you leaving? Your feedback helps us improve.
cancelModal.immediate: Cancel immediately (don't wait for period end)
cancelModal.warnImmediate: Your subscription will be cancelled immediately and you'll lose access to paid features.
cancelModal.warnPeriodEnd: Your subscription will end on {{date}}; you'll keep full access until then.

scheduledDowngrade.title: Scheduled Plan Change
scheduledDowngrade.description: You have a scheduled plan downgrade. Cancel it first if you want to make another change.
scheduledDowngrade.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this scheduled downgrade? You will keep your current plan.

payment.securePaymentDescStripe: Your payment information is securely processed by Stripe. Your card details are not stored by us.
payment.securePaymentDescPaytr: Your payment information is securely processed by PayTR. Your card details are not stored by us.
payment.subscriptionActivated: Your subscription has been successfully activated.

failed.title: Payment Failed
failed.description: The payment could not be completed. This may have been caused by the following reasons:
failed.insufficientBalance: Your card may have insufficient balance
failed.bankRejected: Your bank may have rejected the transaction
failed.contactSupport: If the problem persists, contact support

success.title: Payment Successful!
success.planChangeComplete: Your plan change was completed successfully. Your new plan is now active.
success.subscriptionActive: Your subscription has been successfully activated. You now have access to all features.

subscriptions.featureNotAvailable: The {{feature}} feature is not available in your current plan.
subscriptions.upgradeToAccess: Upgrade to {{plan}} plan to access this feature.
subscriptions.limitReachedDescription: You have reached the {{resource}} limit in your current plan ({{current}}/{{limit}}).
